ns0:entry.ns0:title: VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents
Language: shell
A collection of 100+ specialized Claude Code subagents covering a wide range of development use cases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aaddrick/claude-desktop-debian
Language: shell
Claude Desktop for Debian-based Linux distributions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glittercowboy/taches-cc-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glittercowboy/taches-cc-resources
Language: shell
A collection of my favorite custom Claude Code resources to make life easier.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nelvko/clash-for-linux-install
Language: shell
😼 优雅地使用基于 clash/mihomo 的代理环境

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: travisvn/stop-tahoe-update
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/travisvn/stop-tahoe-update
Language: shell
Prevent your Mac from "upgrading" to Tahoe. A community-led effort to safely block unwanted macOS upgrades.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wnlen/clash-for-linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wnlen/clash-for-linux
Language: shell
🐧 在 Linux 上提供一套完整的 Clash / Mihomo（Clash Meta） 代理与管理面板
